package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for waitgroup_fanout_without_errgroup_on_error_path: WaitGroup-based goroutine fan-out that still carries explicit error-path coordination better suited to errgroup.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: concurrency; severity: info.
func scenario228Positive(items []string) chan int {
	results := make(chan int)
	for _, item := range items {
		go func() {
			time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
			results <- len(item)
		}()
	}
	return results
}
